title: The God That Never Changes
lyrics:
THE GOD THAT NEVER CHANGES
Performed by: Folenius

VERSE 1
Elijah stood alone against 400 prophets of Baal
The people vowed that they would serve the God that would prevail
They jumped and they shouted ‘Oh Baal, where can you be?’
Then God showed up, the fire came down,
and He claimed the victory.

CHORUS
The God that never changes changes everything
He changed the way I walk, the way I talk He changed the song I sing
yesterday, today, forever, His promises stay the same
The God that never changes changes everything

VERSE 2
The blind man sat a beggin’ as Jesus passed His way
He laid His hands upon him with just a little clay
His eyes were open; the chains were broken. They asked, ‘how can this be?’
He said, ‘I don’t know how, but one thing I know, I was blind but now I see!’

CHORUS
The God that never changes changes everything
He changed the way I walk, the way I talk He changed the song I sing
yesterday, today, forever, His promises stay the same
The God that never changes changes everything

BRIDGE
I was headed down the wrong road
I was headed for defeat
Then He changed my heart, He changed my mind
He made a new man out of me

CHORUS
The God that never changes changes everything
He changed the way I walk, the way I talk He changed the song I sing
Yesterday, today, forever, His promises stay the same
The God that never changes changes everything

title: Come On Church
lyrics:
COME ON CHURCH
Performed by: Fern Tucker

VERSE 1
Church, it’s time to get up, it’s time to arise,
The day is at hand to meet Jesus in the sky.
We’ve got to go after lost and dying souls.
We’ve been given the power to break
satan’s strongholds.

CHORUS
Come on church,
Let’s storm the gates of hell,
Come on church,
Take back the prisoner from his cell.
Let’s break the chains of bondage,
Set the captives free.
With a shout of triumph,
We’ll march on to victory.

VERSE 2
Church, God gave us His Word,
And He gave us His Son,
And He gave us authority to work ’til He comes.
Satan is helpless and his work is undone.
So come on Church, let’s work till He comes.

CHORUS
Come on church,
Let’s storm the gates of hell,
Come on church,
Take back the prisoner from his cell.
Let’s break the chains of bondage,
Set the captives free.
With a shout of triumph,
We’ll march on to victory.

VERSE 3
Church the battle’s not ours,
The victory has been won.
Satan is defeated, for He was overcome.
We have power in Jesus’ name
To defeat the foe,
And He told us to go and bring in lost souls.

CHORUS
Come on church,
Let’s storm the gates of hell,
Come on church,
Take back the prisoner from his cell.
Let’s break the chains of bondage,
Set the captives free.
With a shout of triumph,
We’ll march on to victory.

CHORUS
Come on church,
Let’s storm the gates of hell,
Come on church,
Take back the prisoner from his cell.
Let’s break the chains of bondage,
Set the captives free.
With a shout of triumph,
We’ll march on to victory.

TAG
Let’s break the chains of bondage,
Set the captives free
With a shout of triumph,
We’ll march on….
To victory….
(On to victory)

title: God Knows
lyrics:
GOD KNOWS
Performed by: Pattie Mock
(Writer’s Demo)

VERSE 1
She made her way to the altar
Tears streaming down her face
The grief is so much more than she can bear
Her life was changed forever
She'd never be the same
’Lord I need to know, are you really there?’

CHORUS A
God knows, God knows
He can hear the voice of your heart’s cry
When the words aren’t always there
God knows, God knows
When you can’t go on, hold on to Him
He’ll never let you go.

God knows

VERSE 2
He said, ‘I’ll never leave you, nor forsake you’
Though trials come your way
Do not fear and do not be dismayed
He’s working in your favor
And all things for your good
Hold on to His promise, come what may

CHORUS A
God knows, God knows
He can hear the voice of your heart’s cry
When the words aren’t always there
God knows, God knows
When you can’t go on, hold on to Him
He’ll never let you go.

BRIDGE
He’s a strong and mighty tower
You can run to in your pain
He’ll give you strength and comfort
Just call upon His name
When you’re battered by your circumstance
And you cannot face the day
The distance between the pain and peace
Is just a prayer away

CHORUS B
God knows, God knows
He can hear the voice of your heart’s cry
Reach out, He’s always near
God knows, God knows
When you can’t go on, hold on to Him
When you can’t go on, hold on to Him
When you can’t go on, hold on to Him
He’ll never let you go.

TAG
God knows (God knows, God knows)
God knows (Yes, God knows)
God knows

title: What Kind Of Love
lyrics:
WHAT KIND OF LOVE
Performed by: Naomi 'Hap' Edwards

CHORUS
What kind of love would make a man leave Heaven
To bleed and die upon a rugged tree
What kind of love would make Him love the sinner
That kind of love that flows from Calvary

VERSE 1
Silence filled the air; Heavens’ choir ceased their praise
As the angels stood and bowed their heads that day
While the Father told the plan of redemption for all men
And Jesus cried “Father, I will”

CHORUS
What kind of love would make a man leave Heaven
To bleed and die upon a rugged tree
What kind of love would make Him love the sinner
That kind of love that flows from Calvary

VERSE 2
Nails pierced His hands and thorns pierced His brow
While the soldiers stood and gambled for His robe
But as the thief on the tree cried ‘Please remember me’
Jesus cried “Father, forgive”

CHORUS
What kind of love would make a man leave Heaven
To bleed and die upon a rugged tree
What kind of love would make Him love the sinner
That kind of love that flows from Calvary

TAG
What kind of love would make Him love the sinner
That Kind of love that flows from Calvary

title: Be Still And Know That I Am God
file: Be Still And Know That I Am God.mp3
lyrics:
BE STILL AND KNOW THAT I AM GOD
Performed by: Pattie Mock

VERSE 1
When my soul is heavy
I’m feeling overwhelmed
I pray, ‘God I can’t take it one more day.’
Fierce storms rage all around me
They toss me to and fro
In those times I hear Your sweet voice say

CHORUS
Be still and know that I am God
Be still and know that I am God
I’m the Alpha and Omega,
Beginning and the End
I’m the Fairest of Ten Thousand
But I’m your forever friend
Be still and know that I am God

VERSE 2
Over the years of my life, I’ve seen
How you brought me safely through
Every time I needed you, You made a way
You said, ‘I’ll never leave you or forsake you.’
And I know that to be true
For in those times, I always heard You say

CHORUS
Be still and know that I am God
Be still and know that I am God
I’m the Alpha and Omega,
Beginning and the End
I’m the Fairest of Ten Thousand
But I’m your forever friend
Be still and know that I am God

BRIDGE
Oh, when the battle’s raging
Rest assured it’s already won
You see the battle became all His, not ours
When He sent His only Son

CHORUS
Be still and know that He is God
Be still and know that He is God
He’s the Alpha and Omega,
Beginning and the End
He’s the Fairest of Ten Thousand
But He’s my forever friend
Be still and know that He is God

TAG
Oh, Be still and know that He is God

title: I Am The Cross
lyrics:
I AM THE CROSS
Performed by: Pattie Mock

VERSE 1
Death on me, His destiny
Christ would die to set man free
I stood and watched the crowd proclaim
From an unjust trial, He would die in shame

VERSE 2
Nails held His hands and feet
Sacrificed for all to see
And with His arms held open wide
The Lamb of God was crucified

CHORUS A
Angry crowds shout crucify!
He hung on me, condemned to die
He took their place, He paid the cost
I crucified Him…I am the cross

VERSE 3
He hung on me until His death
I felt him take His final breath
Oh, the pain I watched Him bear
The guiltless One who chose to care

CHORUS A
Angry crowds shout crucify!
He hung on me, condemned to die
He took their place, He paid the cost
I crucified Him…I am the cross

BRIDGE
Where once I stood for pain and death,
Now I stand for victory
A symbol of the Father’s love,
Displayed for all to see

CHORUS B
I am the cross where Jesus died
He hung on me to give you life
He took your place, He paid the cost
God’s gift of mercy was the cross

TAG
He took your place, He paid the cost
God’s gift of mercy was the cross
…
Thank you for the cross,
Thank you for the cross.

title: Today Is Your Day
lyrics:
TODAY IS YOUR DAY
Performed by: Folenius

VERSE 1
Thirty-eight years I’ve laid here waiting for the water to move
All alone and so afraid, it seemed my fate was doomed
Then Jesus asked, ‘Will you be made whole?’
He spoke with authority
With no one to help, what can I do?
Then He said these words to me

CHORUS
Today is your day, don’t wait any longer
It’s time to turn from the darkness into the light
Each step you take, our faith is growing stronger
I will take the wrong and make it right

VERSE 2
For so long you’ve searched for the answers, looking for the truth
The wall is too high to climb, there is no door you can go through
But through the dark clouds, the sun is shining the light of a brighter day
Just put your hand in the nail-scarred hands and let Jesus lead the way

CHORUS
Today is your day, on’t wait any longer
It’s time to turn from the darkness into the light
Each step you take, your faith is growing stronger
I will take the wrong and make it right

CHORUS
Today is your day, don’t wait any longer
It’s time to turn from the darkness into the light
Each step you take, your faith is growing stronger
I will take the wrong and make it right

TAG
I will take the wrong and make it right

title: Searching
lyrics:
SEARCHING
Performed by: Pattie Mock
(Demo)

VERSE 1
As the shepherd stood counting his sheep that day
He found that one was missing,
The lamb had lost its way
Standing there, he had a choice to make
To leave the flock to find the one
Would leave a lot at stake

PRE-CHORUS
But knowing it was worth the risk
To bring the lost back in the fold
He loved his little lamb and so,
He made the choice to go

CHORUS 1
He went searching for the one
Searching for the one
For the sheep that left the fold
Had simply lost its way
In the mountains, through the valleys
O’er the hills and through plains
For that one was hurting
And feeling so much pain
He went searching for the one

VERSE 2
I was told of the Shepherd’s love for me
Then I heard Him call my name
It was as clear as could be
The love I felt that moment changed my life
When He said with great compassion
I want you for Mine

PRE-CHORUS
And knowing I was worth the Cross
The sacrifice, He’d pay the cost
Jesus left the throne above
So I could feel His love

CHORUS 2
He came searching for me
Searching for me
Like a sheep, I lost my way
And I had gone astray
In the mountains, through the valleys
O’er the hills and through plains
For He knew I was hurting
And feeling so much pain
He came searching for me

BRIDGE
Softly and tenderly, Jesus is calling
Calling, ‘My children, Come home!’

CHORUS 3
He’s searching for you
Searching for you
If you have lost your way
You can come back home today
His voice is sweetly calling
Calling out your name
Don’t miss this moment,
Call on Him today
He’s searching for you

TAG
Softly and tenderly, Jesus is calling…
He’s searching for you
He’s searching for you
Searching for you…

title: Get Ready
lyrics:
GET READY
Performed by: Fern Tucker

VERSE 1
In this world there are scoffers who say
‘He’s not coming back, so we can live just anyway
We’ve heard that story all our lives
It sounds sorta strange
Seasons come and seasons go
And there’s never been no change…’ but

CHORUS
Jesus is a comin’ back real soon
Could be morning, night or noon
He’s gonna step out on those clouds
He’s gonna shout with a shout so loud…
We’re gonna hear a trumpet blast
We’re gonna meet our Lord at last
And when you hear that trumpet sound…
Get ready to leave the ground

VERSE 2
You can see the signs of His coming everywhere
The excitement, the stirring, the feeling in the air
The Church is being prepared, it could be just anytime
He’s about ready to call…
The saints up to come and dine… cause

CHORUS
Jesus is a comin’ back real soon
Could be morning, night or noon
He’s gonna step out on those clouds
He’s gonna shout with a shout so loud…
We’re gonna hear a trumpet blast
We’re gonna meet our Lord at last
And when you hear that trumpet sound…
Get ready to leave the ground

VERSE 3
We’re gonna meet our loved ones over in glory land
There’ll be shouting and singing and praises all around
As we behold Jesus who saved us by His grace
And we will cry Holy, as we look upon His face

BRIDGE
So you better get ready today
Get ready for the catching away
You don’t want to be left behind
Cause He could come just anytime… Yes

CHORUS
Jesus is a comin’ back real soon
Could be morning, night or noon
He’s gonna step out on those clouds
He’s gonna shout with a shout so loud…
We’re gonna hear a trumpet blast
We’re gonna meet our Lord at last
And when you hear that trumpet sound…
Get ready to leave the ground

TAG
The ground
The ground
Goodbye ground…

title: God Is Real
lyrics:
GOD IS REAL
Performed by: Pattie Mock

VERSE 1
He woke up early Christmas morning
Knowing that the night before
Mom and Dad had told him that
There’d be no Christmas this year
But as he walked into the living room
What he found was no surprise
Presents no one could explain
Then he simply closed his eyes and said...

CHORUS
Oh, I know that God is real
And He hears our every prayer
You don’t have to understand it all
Just know that He is there
He’s real, if you give your life to Him
He will do for you what He’s done for me
Believe that God is real

VERSE 2
The doctor came and told the family,
‘There’s nothing else we can do.
Take her home and make her comfy.
Her days are very few.’
But as the family stood there hand-in-hand,
We prayed in one accord
The diagnosis changed, she’s not the same
Oh, blessed be the Lord!

CHORUS
I know that God is real
And He hears our every prayer
You don’t have to understand it all
Just know that He is there
He’s real, if you give your life to Him
He will do for you what He’s done for me
Believe that God is real

Believe that God is real

CHORUS
I know that God is real
And He hears our every prayer
You don’t have to understand it all
Just know that He is there
He’s real, if you give your life to Him
He will do for you what He’s done for me
Believe that God is real

TAG
Believe that God is real
Believe that God, He’s real!

title: Purchased At A Great Price
lyrics:
PURCHASED AT A GREAT PRICE
Performed by: Fern Tucker

VERSE 1
In the beginning God made Him a man,
He put him in charge of the works of His hands.
Satan lied to man and stole it from him,
Then we were separated from God by sin.

VERSE 2
The love God had for man was strong.
He sent down His own Son to right the wrong.
Oh, what value to Him we must have been
For the price He paid to redeem us from sin…so

CHORUS
I have been purchased at a great price
Paid for by Jesus, my Savior’s own life.
Bought by the blood, the blood of the Lamb.
Possession of God, that’s whose I am.

(TURN-AROUND)

VERSE 3
Serve God or satan, we now have a choice.
We don’t have to die, without any hope.
Jesus freely gave His life on that tree.
Destroyed satan’s plans and set us free.

BRIDGE
Only one worthy to pay such a price
Only one worthy to lay down His life
Only one worthy to make things right,
Only one worthy, was Jesus Christ…

CHORUS
I have been purchased at a great price
Paid for by Jesus, my Savior’s own life.
Bought by the blood, the blood of the Lamb.
Possession of God, that’s whose I am.

TAG
Possession of God, that’s whose I am.

title: I Am
lyrics:
I AM
Performed by: Pattie Mock & Rebekah Knudsen

VERSE 1
Looking back when I was young
I read of You in my scriptures so dear
Of how the blind could see again
And how You brought the dead man to life

CHORUS
You are the Lamb of God, the only begotten
The precious Rose of Sharon, the love of the Father
Redeemer of the nations, Lord, You’ve come to save us all
Wonderful Counselor, Almighty God

VERSE 2
Now that I have years behind
I can see You were right by my side
You’re always there to see me through
You took my hand when I didn’t know what to do

CHORUS
You are the Lamb of God, the only begotten
The precious Rose of Sharon, the love of the Father
Redeemer of the nations, Lord, You’ve come to save us all
Wonderful Counselor, Almighty God

CHORUS B
And then You said...............
I AM, I AM, I AM
I AM, I AM, I AM

BRIDGE
Through the years, You’ve never changed
You’re by my side, You’re still the same
I’m who I am because of who You are

CHORUS
You are the Lamb of God, the only begotten
The precious Rose of Sharon, the love of the Father
Redeemer of the nations, Lord, You’ve come to save us all
Wonderful Counselor, Almighty God

ENDING
I AM
(Yes, You are…yes, You are!)
I AM
(And Your Word is true to the end!)
I AM!

title: Shout The Walls Down
lyrics:
SHOUT THE WALLS DOWN
Performed by: Fern Tucker

VERSE 1
When troubles come against you,
Like a wall that’s all around.
Just remember Israel shouted
The walls of Jericho down.
Well not a word was spoken
As they marched around those walls,
Meditating on the promise,
That the walls were soon to fall.

VERSE 2
On the seventh day they
Marched seven times around.
And they shouted a shout of victory,
Even before those walls came down.
So just you remember when
Your back is against the wall,
Shout the shout of victory,
And great will be their fall.

CHORUS
So come on shout the walls down
They’ll come tumbling to the ground
No matter how thick and
No matter how sound
Shout the walls down
You’ll have the victory
Don’t look at what’s around you
Stand your ground and just believe

(INSTRUMENTAL)

VERSE 3
When the walls of poverty
Sickness and disease
Start closing in around you
And it’s all that you can see.
Just think about the promises
Written in His Word.
And shout the loudest shout
That the devil’s ever heard.

CHORUS
So come on shout the walls down
They’ll come tumbling to the ground
No matter how thick and
No matter how sound
Shout the walls down
You’ll have the victory
Don’t look at what’s around you
Stand your ground and just believe

TAG
No, Don’t look at what’s around you.
Stand your ground and just believe

title: God Says I Win
lyrics:
GOD SAYS I WIN
Performed by: Pattie Mock

VERSE 1
I wake up every morning with so much on my mind
Life, responsibilities, it’s something all the time
But then I look to You, Lord, the keeper of my heart
And say, I’m going to make it, and I’m not defeated
And nothing can take that away

CHORUS
He can’t take my song, the joy in my soul
It’s a gift from above, full of God’s love
I give it to Him
And he can’t take the fire that burns from within
I trust in God. The devil says I lose, but God says I WIN

VERSE 2
So don’t be discouraged when trials prevail
For nothing is too hard for a God who can’t fail
Simply look to Jesus, the keeper of your heart and say
I’m going to make it, I’m not defeated
And nothing can take that away

CHORUS
He can’t take my song, the joy in my soul
It’s a gift from above, full of God’s love
I give it to Him
And he can’t take the fire that burns from within
I trust in God. The devil says I lose, but God says I WIN

(INSTRUMENTAL)

CHORUS
And he can’t take my song, the joy in my soul
It’s a gift from above, full of God’s love
I give it to Him
And he can’t take the fire that burns from within
I trust in God. The devil says I lose, but God says I WIN

title: At The Sound Of That Name
file: At The Sound Of That Name.mp3
lyrics:
AT THE SOUND OF THAT NAME
Performed by: Fern Tucker

VERSE 1
Jesus died on the cross to redeem us from sin.
And through the power of His name, we now can win.
He didn’t leave us alone, to face Satan’s raging.
For His Word is our sword for the war we are waging.

CHORUS
At the sound of that Name, every knee will bow.
At the sound of that Name, every tongue will confess.
At the sound of that Name, we have authority.
At the sound of that Name, demons have to flee.

(INSTRUMENTAL)

VERSE 2
Oh the love that God has reaches down to man.
Oh the love that He has, I just can’t understand.
How a God in His mercy, could love someone like me,
That He sent down His own Son, to die on that tree.

CHORUS
At the sound of that Name, every knee will bow.
At the sound of that Name, every tongue will confess.
At the sound of that Name, we have authority.
At the sound of that Name, demons have to flee.

CHORUS B
At the sound of Your Name, every knee will bow.
At the sound of Your Name, every tongue will confess.
At the sound of Your Name, we have authority.
At the sound of Your Name, demons have to flee.

TAG
Yes, at the sound of that Name…
demons have to flee

title: Rise Up
lyrics:
RISE UP
Performed by: Pattie Mock

VERSE 1
Sunday comes, just like any other
Momma takes her children to worship
The children ask, ‘Daddy, will you come?”
They look back at the doors of the church that day
Hoping this would be the day
He’d change his mind and come walking in
But once again, they sit alone without him.

CHORUS A
RISE UP, take a stand
RISE UP, raise your hands
And be the man that God called you to be
The enemy is defeated
No weapon formed against you
Will come against you or your family

VERSE 2
Momma says, ‘we won’t stop praying.
Every night, we’ll pray, ‘God make a way!
Change his heart. Help him live for you!’’
Sunday comes just like any other
But today is not like the rest, oh no!
Cause through the back door, the children look and see
Daddy’s come to worship with you and me…He says

CHORUS B
I’ll RISE UP. I’ll take a stand.
I’ll RISE UP, I’ll raise my hands
I’ll be the man that God called me to be…yes!
The enemy is defeated
No weapon formed against me
Will come against me or my family

DECLARATION
As the Godly leader of my home
It is my responsibility to teach my children to love the Lord
To provide strength and love to my family
To protect them from negative influences in and out of this world
To lead them in the ways of the Lord so as they follow me, they follow Christ
To be a Godly example to my children
To love my wife
To protect my home
To help them recognize right from wrong
And to lead my family
As we worship the Lord together!!

CHORUS A
RISE UP, take a stand
RISE UP, raise your hands
And be the man that God called you to be…yeah!
The enemy is defeated
No weapon formed against you
Will come against you or your family

ENDING
RISE UP!
Yeah, Yeah…Take a stand
Be the man God called you to be
Ohh…
RISE UP!

title: Come Home My Child
lyrics:
COME HOME MY CHILD
Performed by: Fern Tucker

VERSE 1
You’ve wondered so far away from God,
Running from the hurt inside.
When all the time, He was standing there
With arms open wide.
He said, ‘My Child, come unto to Me,
And I will give you rest.
I’ve not left you, nor forsook you,
To you, I gave my best.’

CHORUS
Come home my child, come home my child.
Don’t let satan steal your soul.
Come home my child, come home my child.
And I will make you whole.
I’ll give you peace past understanding,
And the joy that you once knew.
Come home my child,
For I’m waiting here for you.

VERSE 2
You’ve searched for happiness so long,
As the cares of this life came in.
You put His love upon the shelf,
And spent your life in sin.
Now you may think you can’t come back,
That you don’t deserve His grace,
But the Father’s love is calling you,
‘Come back! It’s not too late.’

CHORUS
Come home my child, come home my child.
Don’t let satan steal your soul.
Come home my child, come home my child.
And I will make you whole.
I’ll give you peace past understanding,
And the joy that you once knew.
Come home my child,
For I’m waiting here for you.

ENDING
Come home my child
For I’m waiting here for you…
(Come home my child)

title: Stand
lyrics:
STAND
Performed by: Pattie Mock

VERSE 1
Feeling like I cannot win,
But trying not to fall
It seems like there’s no one to help me,
There’s no one at all
If I could only close my eyes,
Then I know that I would see
The only way that I can stand
Is when You carry me

CHORUS
Stand, as David stood
Before Goliath with his sling
Stand, He will give you the strength
To conquer anything
Stand, as Jesus stood
When He died on the cross
Stand and claim your victory
No matter what the cost

Stand…

VERSE 2
Now that I know who I am in Christ,
No longer will I be
Captive to the broken dreams
And the lies of the enemy
The Holy Spirit helps me see
When darkness comes my way
That through the living Word of God,
The night will turn to day

CHORUS
Stand, as David stood
Before Goliath with his sling
Stand, He will give you the strength
To conquer anything
Stand, as Jesus stood
When He died on the cross
Stand and claim your victory
No matter what the cost

CHORUS
Stand, as David stood
Before Goliath with his sling
Stand, He will give you the strength
To conquer anything
Stand, as Jesus stood
When He died on the cross
Stand and claim your victory
No matter what the cost

Stand…
Stand…

CHORUS
Stand, as David stood
Before Goliath with his sling
Stand, He will give you the strength
To conquer anything
Stand, as Jesus stood
When He died on the cross
Stand and claim your victory
No matter what the cost

ENDING
Stand…
Oh, stand…
Yeah

The Bible says when you’ve done all you can do
When you’ve given everything you can give
Stand…
Claim your victory, yes!
No matter what the cost, no matter what the cost
Oooh…
Stand!

title: Satan Lost At Calvary
lyrics:
SATAN LOST AT CALVARY
Performed by: Fern Tucker

VERSE 1
If satan had only known Salvation’s plan
That God had made to redeem man
He would not have crucified the Lord upon that tree
Yes, satan lost and I won at Calvary.

VERSE 2
Jesus took our sickness and disease
Because of this now, by His stripes we’re healed
He spoiled powers and principalities
Made a show of them openly
Yes, satan lost and I won at Calvary

CHORUS
Satan lost it all at Calvary
When the blood came pouring down to set me free
He lost his hold on me when Jesus died upon that tree, yes
He lost and I won it all at Calvary

(INSTRUMENTAL)

VERSE 3
Now I thank you Father
For what you have done
For sending down to us your own Son
Thank you Jesus for Calvary,
For the blood you shed to set us free.
Yes, satan lost and I won at Calvary

CHORUS
Satan lost it all at Calvary
When the blood came pouring down to set me free
He lost his hold on me
When Jesus died upon that tree, yes
He lost and I won it all at Calvary

ENDING
Yes, satan lost and I won at Calvary…
(Calvary)

title: Walk By Faith
lyrics:
WALK BY FAITH
Performed by: Fern Tucker with Lavenda Powell

VERSE 1
Don’t walk after the flesh,
Walk after the Spirit
Submit yourselves unto God
Resist the devil and he will flee from you
Draw nigh to God and He’ll draw nigh to you

Be doers of the Word
And not hearers only
Deceiving your own selves
Don’t be weary with well-doing
Don’t faint in your mind,
Don’t faint in your mind.

CHORUS
You must walk by faith and not by your feelings
If you walk by your feelings, You will surely fail
You my speak God’s Word
By calling things that are not
As tho’ they already were,
As tho’ they already were.

VERSE 2
Be ye transformed in your spirit
By renewing of your mind
We look not at things which are seen
But we look at things that are not seen

Let us hold fast the profession of our faith
Without wavering
For He is faithful that has promised
And He will give us what we need,
And He will give us what we need

CHORUS
You must walk by faith and not by your feelings
If you walk by your feelings, You will surely fail
You my speak God’s Word
By calling things that are not
As tho’ they already were,
As tho’ they already were.

ENDING
As tho’ they already were.

title: We Are Not To Fear
lyrics:
WE ARE NOT TO FEAR
Performed by: Fern Tucker

VERSE 1
There is coming a time
When the dead in Christ shall rise.
And we which are alive
Shall be caught up in the sky.
The signs of the times
When that day shall appear,
You can see them everywhere
That day is drawing near.

VERSE 2
We have heard of wars
Death and destruction,
Famines and earthquakes
We hear this every day.
Crime and violence
We’ve never seen the like
And every day we hear someone has took
Another’s life.

CHORUS
But we are not to fear
When we see that day appearing.
We’ll lift up our hands
We’ll shout and we’ll sing. (Hallelujah)
For our redemption is drawing nigh.
So there’s no need to worry and there’s
No need to cry.

(MODULATE)
VERSE 3
This nation was founded
On religious freedom.
Our forefathers fought
This battle and they won.
Now they’ve taken our God
Out of the public schools,
To say a prayer on its grounds
Is against the nation’s rules.

VERSE 4
Now we must go out brother
And win the dying lost.
We must tell of God’s love
No matter what the cost.
Time is growing short
We must work while it is day
No matter what our politicians
And our leaders say.

CHORUS
So we are not to fear
When we see that day appearing.
We’ll lift up our hands
We’ll shout and we’ll sing. (Hallelujah)
For our redemption is drawing nigh
So there’s no need to worry and there’s
No need to cry.

(TURNAROUND)
KEEP ON THE FIRING LINE
You must fight, be brave against all evil
Never run nor even lag behind
But if you would win for God and right
You must keep on the firin’ line

CHORUS
So we are not to fear
When we see that day appearing.
We’ll lift up our hands
We’ll shout and we’ll sing. (Hallelujah)
For our redemption is drawing nigh.
So there’s no need to worry and there’s
No need to cry.

TAG
Yes, there’s no need to worry and there’s
No need to cry…

title: He Shall Be Saved
lyrics:
HE SHALL BE SAVED
Performed by: Pattie Mock

VERSE 1
This narrow path I’m traveling on
Seems rocky more than smooth
But I know to make it through the race
I have to trust in You
This test of faith is so much more
Than I can bear at times
But I hold steadfast to Your Holy Word
And I hold Your hand in mine

CHORUS
It’s not the one who runs the swiftest
Nor the one who shines for a day
But the one who endureth to the end
He, he shall be saved

VERSE 2
So on we’ll go, we’ll finish the race
No matter what the cost might be
Faith in You is where I stand
For it’s You who set me free
To know You is to love You, Lord
I’ll shout it for all to hear
And I stand amazed at your plan for me
I have no doubt or fear

CHORUS
It’s not the one who runs the swiftest
Nor the one who shines for a day
But the one who endureth to the end
He, he shall be saved

ENDING
He shall be saved

So help me, Lord, to stand for truth
To seek Your face in all I do
Dear Lord, I trust in You

I trust in You, Lord
I seek your face
In all I do, I trust you, Lord
He shall be saved
He shall be saved

title: Show Me The Way
lyrics:
SHOW ME THE WAY
Performed by: Pattie Mock

VERSE 1
Searching high, searching low
Not sure which way that I should go
I need You here, I need Your light
You see my path, You know what’s right

PRE-CHORUS
And I can trust in You
I know You’ll see me through

CHORUS
Show me the way, Guide me home
Show me the way, I know I’m not alone

VERSE 2
I’ll take the time, to do it right
I’ll take Your hand and let you guide
Take me away from this place
So I can find amazing grace
PRE-CHORUS
Cause I can trust in You
I know You’ll see me through

CHORUS
Show me the way, Guide me home
Show me the way, I know I’m not alone

CHORUS
Show me the way, Guide me home
Show me the way, I know I’m not alone

VAMP
Show me the way, Lord
I need you to show me the way, Lord

Oh, we worship you, Jesus
We worship you, we worship you, Lord,
We worship you, Jesus

(Show me the way, Show me the way)

I need you, Lord, I need you, Lord
To show me the way

ENDING
I need You here, I need Your light
You see my path, You know what’s right
